title: FlameHomes
description: FlameHomes is the flagship plugin of a free, open-source suite designed to provide server owners with powerful and lightweight versions of every essential Minecraft server utility.
body:
# FlameHomes 🔥 The Perfect Homes Plugin

**FlameHomes** isn't just another homes plugin—it's the beginning of a revolution for server owners. As the first release from **ArkFlame Development's** free plugin suite, our goal is to create the absolute best version of every essential plugin and give it to the community for free. No premium versions, no paid features, just pure performance and power.

This plugin provides a complete, modern, and highly optimized homes system suitable for any server, from a small SMP with friends to a large-scale network. It's built to be incredibly lightweight while offering the premium features you'd normally pay for.

## ✨ Features

*   **Unlimited Homes & Per-Permission Limits:** Control exactly how many homes players can set with a flexible permission system (`flamehomes.limit.<number>`).
*   **Full Economy Integration (Vault):** Optionally charge players a configurable amount to set a home.
*   **Teleport Warmups & Cooldowns:** Prevent combat logging and command spam with configurable delays and stand-still requirements.
*   **Intuitive GUI Menu:** A clean and simple GUI for players to view, manage, and teleport to their homes with `/homes`.
*   **Advanced Customization:** Modify every single message with our built-in language system. We even include English (`en.yml`) and Spanish (`es.yml`) by default!
*   **PlaceholderAPI Support:** Display player home stats on scoreboards, in chat, or anywhere else with `%flamehomes_current_homes%` and `%flamehomes_max_homes%`.
*   **Extreme Performance:** All data loading and saving is handled asynchronously to ensure your server never lags when a player joins or their data is saved.
*   **Wide Version Compatibility:** Built to run flawlessly on any server from **1.8 to 1.21+** using Java 8 or higher.

## ⚙️ Commands & Permissions

### Player Commands
*   `/sethome <name>` - Sets a home at your current location.
*   `/home <name>` - Teleports to a specific home.
*   `/delhome <name>` - Deletes a home.
*   `/homes` - Opens the GUI or lists your homes in chat.

### Admin Commands
*   `/flamehomes reload` - Reloads the configuration and language files.

### Core Permissions
*   `flamehomes.use` - Grants access to all basic player commands. (Default: true)
*   `flamehomes.limit.<number>` - Sets a player's maximum home limit (e.g., `flamehomes.limit.5`).
*   `flamehomes.limit.unlimited` - Allows a player to set infinite homes.
*   `flamehomes.reload` - Allows use of the `/flamehomes reload` command. (Default: op)
*   `flamehomes.bypass.cooldown` - Bypasses the teleport cooldown.
*   `flamehomes.bypass.warmup` - Bypasses the teleport warmup.
*   `flamehomes.bypass.cost` - Bypasses the economy cost for setting a home.

## 🔌 Dependencies

*   **Vault** (Optional): Required for all economy features.
*   **PlaceholderAPI** (Optional): Required for placeholder support.

## 🚀 Part of a Bigger Project

FlameHomes is just the start. Our mission is to build a complete suite of ~100 essential plugins, including `MobStacker`, `ChatSentinel` and more, all with the same commitment to quality, performance, and being **100% free**.
